synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21398-1 Oracle Linux 8 kernel bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21398-1
description:
[4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1]
- scsi: core: Restrict legal sdev_state transitions via sysfs (Uday Shankar) [Orabug: 37778230]

[4.18.0-553.84.1]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.3
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34750652]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985772]

[4.18.0-553.84.1]
- cgroup: don't put ERR_PTR() into fc->root (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-123775]
- vsock/virtio: Validate length in packet header before skb_put() (Jon Maloy) [RHEL-114296] {CVE-2025-39718}
- NFS: remove revoked delegation from server's delegation list (Benjamin Coddington) [RHEL-123005]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21398-1

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21398-1.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
bpftool-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-abi-stablelists-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
kernel-core-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-cross-headers-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-debug-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-debug-core-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-debug-devel-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-debug-modules-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-debug-modules-extra-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-devel-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-doc-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.noarch.rpm
kernel-headers-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-modules-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-modules-extra-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-tools-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-tools-libs-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-tools-libs-devel-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
perf-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
python3-perf-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/kernel-4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4.18.0-553.84.1.0.1]
- scsi: core: Restrict legal sdev_state transitions via sysfs (Uday Shankar) [Orabug: 37778230]

[4.18.0-553.84.1]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.3
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34750652]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985772]

[4.18.0-553.84.1]
- cgroup: don't put ERR_PTR() into fc->root (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-123775]
- vsock/virtio: Validate length in packet header before skb_put() (Jon Maloy) [RHEL-114296] {CVE-2025-39718}
- NFS: remove revoked delegation from server's delegation list (Benjamin Coddington) [RHEL-123005]
